sentences.text: All seniors are required to attend the capstone presentation next Friday.
The writing center is open every weekday from nine to five.
You can borrow laptops from the tech desk for up to three days.
Graduate seminars are held in the north wing of the humanities building.
Please silence your phone before entering the lecture auditorium.
The research symposium will feature speakers from six different countries.
Final exam schedules are posted outside the registrar's office now.
